allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $pids = $conns | ForEach-Object { $_.OwningProcess } | Sort-Object -Unique; $pids | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $_" } catch { "PID $_ already gone" } })
